events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young and still making headlines. Happy birthday to the iconic Paul McCartney, a true legend of music.

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful vocals and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of the 80s
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her voice defined an era and continues to captivate.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Award-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, is it 77 you're looking for?
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years of timeless hits! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning singer and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun (at 73)
angles.copy: The iconic Cyndi Lauper turns 73 today! Still a true original and an absolute force in music.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: A true musical genius, gone too soon. We're remembering George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Remembered
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love at 86
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Still spreading peace and love around the world.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God & Astrophysicist
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the magnificent Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and a true British icon.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got the Moves at 83
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Remember when music videos changed everything? Today marks the anniversary of MTV's launch, kicking off with The Buggles.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, propelling them to superstardom.

angles.name: A Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis gave us 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop masterpiece that still sounds as fresh today.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music continues to define rock and roll.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day in 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years today since the world lost a lyrical legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost a true pioneer. Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Crossing the Road to History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: A Pretender at 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and an undeniable force in music.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Still Mad For It at 54
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975, four years after its US release and the album of the same name.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since 'Imagine' became a UK single. John Lennon's message of peace remains as powerful as ever.

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1,000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod. Remember the click wheel? It changed everything.
